ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company */,
  "cik" INTEGER /* Central Index Key for the company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector classification of the company */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "business_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company's business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Current Ratio) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the financial metric */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial report */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market data entry */,
  "market_index" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the index value */,
  "index_value" REAL /* Value of the market index for that year */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user profile */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_performance" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment record */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the investment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which returns are calculated */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns for the investment during that year */,
  "benchmark_returns" REAL /* Benchmark returns for comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_performance_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the filing */,
  "cik" INTEGER /* Central Index Key for the company */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of the filing (e.g., 10-K, 10-Q) */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date of the filing */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the filing document */,
  "filing_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_filings_cik FOREIGN KEY ("cik") REFERENCES companies ("cik")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance metric */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the forecast */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company being forecasted */,
  "forecast_year" INTEGER /* Year for the forecast */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted value for that year */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Methodology used for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report related to the comment */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_comments_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the analyst */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Summary of the analyst's experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parent_companies" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parent company */,
  "cik" INTEGER /* Central Index Key for the parent company */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the parent company */,
  "parent_industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the parent company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsidiaries" (
  "subsidiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the subsidiary */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent company */,
  "cik" INTEGER /* Central Index Key for the subsidiary */,
  "subsidiary_name" TEXT /* Full name of the subsidiary */,
  "subsidiary_industry" TEXT /* Industry classification of the subsidiary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsidiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsidiaries_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parent_companies ("parent_id")
)
